subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast loved Me! We make mention of thee with such remembrance that they who are nigh unto God inhale therefrom the sweet fragrances of the verses of their All-Knowing, All-Wise Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرک من احبنی ذکرناک بذکر یجد منه المقربون نفحات آیات ربهم العلیم الحکیم یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
